entry.title: Re: Rules drop-down list is empty in OPD transaction (Out...
entry.content: same problem any resolution to that?

entry.title: Re: Fornecedor com mais de uma conta bancária, substituiç...
entry.content: Hi Gavin,

entry.title: Re: /SCWM/PI_CC_CREATE result to be one Physical Inventor...
entry.content:
Well, I never suggested they were.

We have been able to tweak the transaction selection screen to create inactive, individual pid's with one product each, but you have to activate them one at a time to get just one product per warehouse order. The hope is to find a way to automate that last step, preventing manual intervention prior to cycle counting.

entry.title: Re: Fornecedor com mais de uma conta bancária, substituiç...
entry.content: Hi Gavin

entry.title: Re: Fornecedor com mais de uma conta bancária, substituiç...
entry.content: Hi Gavin, thank you for your help and availability, but that's what I mentioned above. The substitution rule will only apply to documents originating from the FI. Other documents originating from the MM will not be subject to the rule.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano and My fellow SAP learner's 

Hope this Blog/Post will be helpful to Both beginner's and Professionals in SAP.

First of All, I want to sincerely express my vote of thanks to @David_Chaviano and SAP Team for creating such a beautiful programme  Digital Skills Initiative and creating awareness in SAP community how useful it can be for the career growth.

Learning Journey in my point of view -

How it started - I am SAP professional User and having professional IT experience of 2.3 years been laid off on last year of November, not able immediately grab a job in search of it I concluded to sharpen my skills and do some certifications started doing some research directly from SAP websites where we can learn the subject from A to Z, but certification cost & sap learning hub access are unaffordable for me at that point of time again back to the search engine just typed "SAP Free Certification" immediately got to know about Digital Skills Initiative programme have through the guided steps provided by David that is my initial of my learning.

How Digital Skills Initiative Changed My Confidence levels - 

My expertise are in SAP Material Management so I want to sharpen my skills in that Area in search for the learning path picked up SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Sourcing and Procurement would be a brain Stromer. It helped me to increase my skills in SAP MM topics like inventory management, procurement life cycle, consumption-based planning, invoice verification, Material requirement planning and integrations with cross functional modules like FI, SD, PP, QM. Finally, I have completed all my learning and dropped a mail to digitalskills@sap.com with completed learning path screen shot requesting for certificate attempt and boom! got my free certification voucher scheduled exam with priority given my best attempt cleared the exam with 74% and got my certification (C_TS452_2022) very recently with joys & tears and attaching my certificate for your reference.

Study Sources of my learning journey -

1. SAP Learning Hub (Paid) - SAP S/4HANA - Sourcing and Procurement- loading... | SAP Help Portal

Before Selecting the learning path, please categorize yourself in these two- application operational (support projects), application development (implementation projects) I urge to take both because you will know end to end.

2. SAP Learning (Free) (Application Operational) - Exploring Functions and Innovation in SAP S/4HANA Sourcing and Procurement

3. SAP learning (Free) (Application Development) - Implementing SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, Sourcing and Procurement

4. SAP Press books much need for deep studying (Paid) - Materials Management (MM) with SAP S/4HANA | Book and E-Book - by SAP PRESS (sap-press.com)

5. Open SAP (free unlimited) - SAP S/4HANA UX for Business and Functional Experts | openSAP

Third party to refer - 

Udemy - SAP MM Training - in Plain English | Udemy.

For Beginners -

Udemy - SAP Simplified for Absolute Beginners | Udemy

Udemy - SAP S/4HANA Training - in Plain English | Udemy

Coursera - SAP Technology Consultant Professional Certificate | Coursera

SAP Learning (free) - Executing Business Processes in SAP S/4HANA Utilities

But I would urge my fellow SAP learners to use sap websites like SAP Learning hub, SAP Press, Open SAP a fantastic platform you can learn free of cost in end your confidence level boosts up in a full end to end framework. Please take SAP sample exam before taking main exam and do practice multiple choice questions from third party websites.

Pros and Cons of Digital Skills Initiative Programme -

Pros - 

1. Development in career growth.

2. Able to take the interview with confidence and show your expertise.

3. Career Advancement and Structured Learning Path

4. SAP Community advantage - I even don't know before entering into the digital Skills Initiative programme we can use a community this effective where your doubts can be clarified and solution for errors during your project implementation can be found.

5. Free Certification 😎 a solid add - on

Cons -

There are no cons in this programme only benefits and advantages is the add on

Suggestions -

If I want to give a suggestion it will be out of line but, if possible I would urge SAP team to provide free SAP press books and sap learning hub professional edition subscriptions free by conducting similar event like digital Skills Initiative .

Once again Thanks for giving this incredible opportunity @David_Chaviano and SAP Team.

Best Regards,

NiteeshReddy.

entry.title: FUE calculation for Z objects - Rise With SAP
entry.content:
Hi,

We are discussing with our potential client about developing a Fiori app to create records on Z objects, these records will be created by individual SAP users. These specific users, just assigned to a role with Z object record rights and not able to reach standard SAP t-codes.

When we tried to simulate this situation on a starter system with running "SLIM_USER_CLF_HELP" program, we couldn't get any exact match with FUE classifcation like advanced,core or self-service.

The question is how can we consider these users to match with FUE classification?

entry.title: Re: Easy way to write data via a deep entity in OData
entry.content:
Hi kapilmahire14.

I met the same error. Impossible to generate the service in /IWFND/MAINT_SERVICE eventhough class generation was possible.

So I built a DDIC structure with identifical properties, than removed DEFINE methods but also custom types in MPC_EXT.

Goods news, service generation worked well !

Bad news, impossible to submit the nested payload. It causes errors. Basically, only data compatible with the URI entityset are accepted. The rest causes parsing issues.

I am seriously wondering if complex REST webservice from OData and ABAP is possible. If anyone reads this and his a clue to propose, it might make my day for years !!!

entry.title: Why is RCT1.CheckNum (Check No.) on Form 196 (Payment Means) is displaying as 0.
entry.content: RCT1.CheckNum (Check No.) on Form 196 (Payment Means) is displayed as 0. However, the associated CheckNum returns correctly in a query. What is causing this?

entry.title: Re: SAP eDocument installation
entry.content:
Hi, the E-Invoicing solution is part of DRC, it encompasses both E-Invoicing and Statutory Reporting on S/4. Here the coverage:

DRC Help Page, S/4 on prem and Private Edition: https://help.sap.com/viewer/3b2c091e13434f9ab2fb53d147ba5e9f/LATEST/en-US/097165e9c1074038847625e5c53e07d2.html

A license is required, please reach out to your SAP Account Executive. 

Here a great link to check the implementation effort:

https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-edition/sap-document-and-reporting-compliance-cloud-edition/what-is-sap-document-and-reporting-compliance-cloud-edition

(left column)

This site will also help: https://pages.community.sap.com/topics/document-reporting-compliance

entry.title: Re: Fornecedor com mais de uma conta bancária, substituiç...
entry.content: Hi Eric,

entry.title: Re: Fornecedor com mais de uma conta bancária, substituiç...
entry.content:
Hi Eric,

You can write a substitution in GGB1 - Financial accounting.

This would ensure your substitution works for every accounting document that is created, irrespective of it being through FI,MM, SD modules.
That means even if document is posted through MIRO & accounting document is created, this substitution would get called.

 

Regards,

Gavin.

entry.title: Re: REGEX - How to Replace special case
entry.content: This is exactly what I want. The problem is, that I receive the file from a Payment Service Provider as a csv-file. And there is no possibility to change this

entry.title: Re: How to search for only one property in Object Table o...
entry.content:
You can write a rule for the Object Table Target Query Options to customize the search string to restrict the required search.

E.g., 

export default function SearchCustomer(context) {
let pageProxy = context.getPageProxy();
let search = context.searchString;
let qoB = context.dataQueryBuilder();
if(search && search != ''){
let productname = qoB.filterTerm(`substringof(tolower('${search}'),tolower(Name))`);
qoB.filter().or(fname);
return qoB;
}
}
 
In this case, search will look only for Name property. 
You can find more details on customizing query options using Data query builder here.

entry.title: Problem when binding CAP application with PostgreSQL, Hyperscaler Option - No default database
entry.content:
Hi all,

recently I've been trying to connect a CAP application with an instance on the BTP of a PostgreSQL database. I actually managed to do so, meaning that I was able to deploy a Fiori application on my SAP Build Work Zone that can read and write to this instance of the "PostgreSQL, Hyperscaler Option" service (I verified so with PgAdmin). The problem is that to create this connection I just had to use the line "cds add postgres" to add the package "@cap-js/postgres" to my dependencies, so that when I generate the mta.yaml file all the necessary resources are added. When I deploy to Cloud Foundry, the application automatically connects with the instance of PostgreSQL and I'm not allowed to edit the details of the connection, including the specific database to which I desire to connect. This results in the fact that my application gets bound to the default database that gets created automatically.

What if I wanted to sync my data to a different database? If I had a nodejs application I'd just specify the desired database name in the "Pool" parameters. But here in CAP it seems that I can't specify any of those options.

Thanks in advance,

Edoardo

entry.title: Re: Given a date, how to find the nearest Monday using SA...
entry.content: Sorry, I don´t have a code available for this. If you are familiar with JavaScript you should be able to manage it.

entry.title: Build SSAM 2405 failed - missing extension SAMFoundation
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I'm currently trying to build a branded client of SSAM 2405 from current metadata in MDK 24.4.0 and MDK Plugin 2405.0.0 according to Compatibility Matrix.

At last step, create-client command throws an error that extension-SAMFoundation is missing.

Did anyone here had the same problem? How could we fix it?

Best regards,

Fabio Purcino

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano and My fellow SAP learner's

Hope this Blog/Post will be helpful to Both beginner's and Professionals in SAP.

First of All, I want to sincerely express my vote of thanks to @David_Chaviano and SAP Team for creating such a beautiful programme Digital Skills Initiative and creating awareness in SAP community how useful it can be for the career growth.

Learning Journey in my point of view 

How it started - I am SAP professional User and having professional IT experience of 2.3 years been laid off on last year of November, not able immediately grab a job in search of it I concluded to sharpen my skills and do some certifications started doing some research directly from SAP websites where we can learn the subject from A to Z, but certification cost & sap learning hub access are unaffordable for me at that point of time again back to the search engine just typed "SAP Free Certification" immediately got to know about Digital Skills Initiative programme have through the guided steps provided by David that is my initial of my learning.

How Digital Skills Initiative Changed My Confidence levels -

My expertise are in SAP Material Management so I want to sharpen my skills in that Area in search for the learning path picked up #SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Sourcing and Procurement would be a brain Stromer. It helped me to increase my skills in SAP MM topics like inventory management, procurement life cycle, consumption-based planning, invoice verification, Material requirement planning and integrations with cross functional modules like FI, SD, PP, QM. Finally, I have completed all my learning and dropped a mail to digitalskills@sap.com with completed learning path screen shot requesting for certificate attempt and boom! got my free certification voucher scheduled exam with priority given my best attempt cleared the exam with 74% and got my certification (C_TS452_2022) very recently with joys & tears and attaching my certificate for your reference.

Study Sources of my learning journey -

1. SAP Learning Hub (Paid) - SAP S/4 Hana Sourcing and procurement - loading... | SAP Help Portal 

Before Selecting the learning path, please categorize yourself in these two- application operational (support projects), application development (implementation projects) I urge to take both because you will know end to end.

2. SAP Learning (Free) (Application Operational) - Exploring Functions and Innovation in SAP S/4HANA Sourcing and Procurement

3. SAP learning (Free) (Application Development) - Implementing SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, Sourcing and Procurement

4. SAP Press books much need for deep studying (Paid) -Materials Management (MM) with SAP S/4HANA | Book and E-Book - by SAP PRESS (sap-press.com)

5. Open SAP (free unlimited) -SAP S/4HANA UX for Business and Functional Experts | openSAP

Third party to refer -

Udemy - SAP MM Training - in Plain English | Udemy

For Beginners-

Udemy - SAP Simplified for Absolute Beginners | Udemy

Udemy - SAP S/4HANA Training - in Plain English | Udemy

Coursera - SAP Technology Consultant Professional Certificate | Coursera

SAP Learning (free) - Executing Business Processes in SAP S/4HANA Utilities

But I would urge my fellow SAP learners to use sap websites like SAP Learning hub, SAP Press, Open SAP a fantastic platform you can learn free of cost in end your confidence level boosts up in a full end to end framework. Please take SAP sample exam before taking main exam and do practice multiple choice questions from third party websites.

Pros and Cons of Digital Skills Initiative Programme -

Pros -

1. Development in career growth.

2. Able to take the interview with confidence and show your expertise.

3. Career Advancement and Structured Learning Path

4. SAP Community advantage - I even don't know before entering into the digital Skills Initiative programme we can use a community this effective where your doubts can be clarified and solution for errors during your project implementation can be found.

5. Free Certification 😎 a solid add - on

Cons -

There are no cons in this programme only benefits and advantages is the add on

Suggestions -

If I want to give a suggestion it will be out of line but, if possible I would urge SAP team to provide free SAP press books and sap learning hub professional edition subscriptions free by conducting similar event like Digital Skills Initiative

Once again Thanks for giving this incredible opportunity @David_Chaviano and SAP Team.

Best Regards,

NiteeshReddy.

entry.title: Re: Integration with a Vendor
entry.content: We tried as well. The provider for now is not willing to build such integrations. We are evaluating the option to integrate by calling their APIs.

entry.title: My experience in digital skills initiative programme
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano and My fellow SAP learner's

Hope this Blog/Post will be helpful to Both beginner's and Professionals in SAP.

First of All, I want to sincerely express my vote of thanks to @David_Chaviano and SAP Team for creating such a beautiful programme Digital Skills Initiative and creating awareness in SAP community how useful it can be for the career growth.

Learning Journey in my point of view -

How it started - I am SAP professional User and having professional IT experience of 2.3 years been laid off on last year of November, not able immediately grab a job in search of it I concluded to sharpen my skills and do some certifications started doing some research directly from SAP websites where we can learn the subject from A to Z, but certification cost & sap learning hub access are unaffordable for me at that point of time again back to the search engine just typed "SAP Free Certification" immediately got to know about Digital Skills Initiative programme have through the guided steps provided by David that is my initial of my learning.

How Digital Skills Initiative Changed My Confidence levels -

My expertise are in SAP Material Management so I want to sharpen my skills in that Area in search for the learning path picked up #SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Sourcing and Procurement would be a brain Stromer. It helped me to increase my skills in SAP MM topics like inventory management, procurement life cycle, consumption-based planning, invoice verification, Material requirement planning and integrations with cross functional modules like FI, SD, PP, QM. Finally, I have completed all my learning and dropped a mail to digitalskills@sap.com with completed learning path screen shot requesting for certificate attempt and boom! got my free certification voucher scheduled exam with priority given my best attempt cleared the exam with 74% and got my certification (C_TS452_2022) very recently with joys & tears and attaching my certificate for your reference.

Study Sources of my learning journey -

1. SAP Learning Hub (Paid) - SAP S/4 Hana Sourcing and procurement - loading... | SAP Help Portal 

Before Selecting the learning path, please categorize yourself in these two- application operational (support projects), application development (implementation projects) I urge to take both because you will know end to end.

2. SAP Learning (Free) (Application Operational) - Exploring Functions and Innovation in SAP S/4HANA Sourcing and Procurement

3. SAP learning (Free) (Application Development) - Implementing SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, Sourcing and Procurement

4. SAP Press books much need for deep studying (Paid) -Materials Management (MM) with SAP S/4HANA | Book and E-Book - by SAP PRESS (sap-press.com)

5. Open SAP (free unlimited) -SAP S/4HANA UX for Business and Functional Experts | openSAP

For Beginners-

But I would urge my fellow SAP learners to use sap websites like SAP Learning hub, SAP Press, Open SAP a fantastic platform you can learn free of cost in end your confidence level boosts up in a full end to end framework. Please take SAP sample exam before taking main exam and do practice multiple choice questions from third party websites.

Pros and Cons of Digital Skills Initiative Programme -

Pros -

1. Development in career growth.

2. Able to take the interview with confidence and show your expertise.

3. Career Advancement and Structured Learning Path

4. SAP Community advantage - I even don't know before entering into the digital Skills Initiative programme we can use a community this effective where your doubts can be clarified and solution for errors during your project implementation can be found.

5. Free Certification 😎 a solid add - on

Cons -

There are no cons in this programme only benefits and advantages is the add on

Suggestions -

If I want to give a suggestion it will be out of line but, if possible I would urge SAP team to provide free SAP press books and sap learning hub professional edition subscriptions free by conducting similar event like Digital Skills Initiative

Once again Thanks for giving this incredible opportunity @David_Chaviano and SAP Team.

Best Regards,

NiteeshReddy.

entry.title: Build SSAM 2405 failed - Missing extension SAMFoundation
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I'm currently trying to build a branded client of SSAM 2405 from current metadata in MDK 24.4.0 and MDK Plugin 2405.0.0 according to Compatibility Matrix.

At last step, create-client command throws an error that extension-SAMFoundation is missing.

 

Did anyone here had the same problem? How could we fix it?

Best regards,

Fabio Purcino

entry.title: Re: How to share MDK app with colleagues?
entry.content:
If the MDK SDK is not an option, an alternate way to build a branded client is by using the Cloud Build service. See this tutorial for details. Once the build is successful, you can download the binaries locally. You can also use Mobile App Catalog feature where you can upload the binary, publish it, and then share the link to install the app on a device by scanning the QR code.

Regarding the error message, it seems that your team member is not yet a user in the subaccount where the mobile client is supposed to connect to. To resolve this, go to BTP cockpit > Security > Users > create user. Once done, your team member should be able to login.

Please note that the public app store client "SAP Mobile Services Client (Mobile Svcs)" is intended for quick testing and proof of concept purposes. For productive usage, we recommend that you create a branded client using either MDK SDK or SAP Mobile Services cloud build service which allows to predefine the connection to an SAP Mobile Services app configuration, skipping the onboarding process via QR code. Additionally, you can build multiple clients for multiple apps.

entry.title: Operating Globally with Confidence: Learn about E-invoicing and Compliance at SAP Sapphire 2024
entry.content:
In the increasingly interconnected global economy, businesses are continually growing their reach across international borders. However, this expansion brings its own set of challenges, particularly when it comes to adhering to varying local regulations such as e-invoicing and e-reporting. SAP's localized solutions are designed to help your business navigate these complexities, allowing you to focus on growth and innovation without getting caught by surprise by regulatory hurdles.  

If you want to take your business to the next level to successfully navigate new markets and connect with a diverse global customer base, then make sure to join us at SAP Sapphire 2024 for a series of sessions on Localization.

At SAP Sapphire 2024, you will have the opportunity to meet with Localization experts, hear from SAP’s customers how Localization is helping them, and learn how SAP is applying AI to Localization.

You can expect insights into e-invoicing and compliance with SAP Document and Reporting Compliance, subscription billing and recurring revenue with SAP Billing Revenue and Innovation Management, managing legal changes with the regulatory change manager, US indirect tax reporting with SAP Document and Reporting Compliance, and more.

 

SAP Sapphire Orlando – June 3-5, 2024

ERP182 | Roche: Powering e-invoicing and global compliance

Wednesday, June 5, at 11:00 a.m. EDT

Speakers:

Elvira Wallis, Senior Vice President and Global Head of SAP Globalization, SAP SE

Pedro Lopes, IT Program Lead, Global Finance Transformation, Roche

BTP 144B | Innovate with SAP BTP – How Localization Powers Global Compliance

Tuesday, June 4, at 2:00 p.m. EDT and Wednesday, June 5, at 10 a.m. EDT

Speakers:

David Branley, Product Manager, SAP Globalization, SAP

Erika Buson, Product Marketing, Global Tax Management, SAP

Max Skalatsky, Vice President, Head of Product Localization, SAP

SAP runs SAP: DIS107| Future-proofing SAP for cloud-business volumes

Tuesday, June 4, at 11:30 a.m. EDT

Speaker: Fabian Wissmann, Program Director, Strategy & Operations for Global Finance, SAP SE

 

SAP Sapphire Barcelona - June 11-13, 2024

BTP230 | Drägerwerk’s strategy for global e-invoicing compliance built on SAP BTP

Wednesday, June 12, at 2:30 p.m. CEST and Thursday, June 13, at 10:30 a.m. CEST

Speakers:

Janusz Smilek, Vice President and Global Head of SAP Globalization Product Management, SAP Globalization, SAP SE

Natascha Kopperschmidt, SAP FI Senior Consultant, Drägerwerk

 

Do not miss this opportunity to learn from the leading localized software solution provider. Register now for SAP Sapphire 2024 and join our sessions on Localization.

 

We are looking forward to meeting you there!

entry.title: FC push to DM Path for public API
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am looking for the API path noted in the SAP Financial Consolidation (FC) help link below to be able to directly push report bundles to Disclosure Management.  How do identify the path for public API on the DM server?
We are upgrading DM.  Previously the path was http://<server>:<port>/WebServices/PublicAPI.  The instructions direct to setup as: http://<server>:<port>/DM_path_for_public_API.  

Our Basis contact is not familiar with this.

FC help Link:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_BUSINESSOBJECTS_FINANCIAL_CONSOLIDATION/b9d07a1932014658b7ac8268c5c2b41d/fa1254fe6faf1014878bae8cb0e91070.html?advAll=Disclosure%20Management

Thanks

Eyal

entry.title: Re: Latest Updates to the Reimagined Applicant Management Tool in SAP SuccessFactors Recruiting
entry.content:
Hello, 

I see that in 1H 2025 the Legacy Workbench will be deprecated. However, I have not noticed a specific date for the ability to Print applications? This was an important feature in Legacy as there are many legal reasons as to why we need to print applications. Is there a more specific date in which that development will come through? Thats truly the biggest pain point for us and the reason not all can adapt to the new workbench.

Thank you,

entry.title: Re: OpenID for S/4HANA On-Prem for User Login without usi...
entry.content:
Just to add information on this.

Further options have been added in the SOIDC transactions in newer versions to map other claims instead of the fixed one 'sub'

entry.title: Re: DI API Create OWOR : Invalid node index
entry.content:
Disculpa, pudiste resolver este error? ,  me puedes compartir tu solución porque tengo el mismo problema pero no encuentro documentación al respecto.

Saludos.

entry.title: HRA pay component value as amount .
entry.content:
Hi Seniors 

Please help me with the below query .

HRA pay component type is " Percentage " which is 40% of Basic pay but in UI screen wanted see sum of 40% only

HRA needs to be shown as a sum instead of a percentage

entry.title: Re: DI API Create OWOR : Invalid node index
entry.content: Excuse me, were you able to resolve this error? Can you share your solution with me because I have the same problem but I can't find documentation about it.

entry.title: Re: How to use OAuth 2.0 authorization while using SAP S/...
entry.content:
Hi Peter,

I don't think I have setup the token in AIS - we have done it in BTP before in the Security section.

I am curious about the API URL you are calling and what you are getting for a pop up.

What URL are you calling? I would expect it to be in the format of https://my[nnnnnn]-api.s4hana.ondemand.com/sap/opu/odata/

Azure should be able to provide you some low level logging to get the content of the popup. I would recommended to do your prototyping in a tool like Postman (i see you mentioned you are using it in your comment, but what is the content of the popup)?

Maybe this tutorial is helpful?

https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/btp-integration-suite-oauth-client-certificate.html

The API Hub has a Try It Now feature where you can put in the credentials to your system and try various GET calls (won't be able to do Patch or PUT).

https://api.sap.com/products/SAPS4HANACloud/apis/all

 

Thank you
Jerry

entry.title: MR11 Errors-Line 1 cancelled but invoice posted so couldn't cancel line - credit note
entry.content:
Hi Friends,

User is unable to clear old intercompany items in MR11. He is getting the following errors. We are ECC 6.0.

Nothing to write off - check against GRIR report
Write off - small difference
No GR
Need copy invoice
Not fully receipted
No GR and PO raised incorrectly
Line 1 cancelled but invoice posted so couldn't cancel line - credit note

Please suggest, how to resolve the issue.

Regards
Sridhar

entry.title: Source of material sales text in sales order.
entry.content:
Hi, 

 

I am not able to find out the source of material sales text in my sales order. There is no sales text maintained in MM03 or in customer material info record. If i click on log it says text could not be obtained but there is text available. As the order is created by idoc, i checked idoc segments but i could not find text being sent in any of the segments. When i created similar order manually and saved it, no text was determined. I have checked with Business and they mentioned that they are not entering it manually. Any idea what could be the source.

entry.title: Re: Build SSAM 2405 failed - Missing extension SAMFoundation
entry.content: Please make sure you are using the 2405 branding SDK SAM.mdkproject as the starting point for assembling the extensions and Metadata for 2405.

entry.title: Re: 1042S Income Codes for IRS
entry.content: Hi Martin,

entry.title: Re: SAP Service and Asset Manager 2405 Now Available – What’s New?
entry.content: Are Linear data available on work orders as well as Notification on this version? I haven't able to find linear data during creation of work orders or notification in version 2210.

entry.title: Re: Restrict release of production order if no cost exist...
entry.content:
Hi Jitendra,

Have you already investigated the Production Operations BADI (https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/2bba750d1e124e1ea2a039bb1cd9b6c5/c20b8cfa8000468d86a005ec6d03259f.html?locale=en-US)

Manufacturing Order Check before Save (BD_MFGORDER_CHECK_BEFORE_SAVE)

"You can use this BAdI to implement your own custom logic to check the order data on header, on operation, and on component level before saving the order"

You should be able to confirm in the logic if the standard cost exists and prevent the save of the Production Order.

Thank you

Jerry

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to print from FIORI for a specific printer ?
entry.content:
I have created a couple of ABAP Restful apps that print in SAP.
What kind of issue are you having?

entry.title: Re: Value Help with edit field and navigation
entry.content: In my case, two times I needed a Value Help out of the ordinary. Those two times I had to develop the value help using SAPUI5 and then call the RAP CREATE action using javascript. Unfortunately, SAP/Fiori Elements is very limited in terms of value help flexibility.

entry.title: Article Basic Data Text LTEXT_GRUN is not being copied from Generic to Variant.
entry.content:
Hello Gurus,

I have facing a strange issue, where the Basic Data text along with Inspection text is part of Additional Tab in Article Master. 
Whenever the Generic article's Basic Data text is updated with some value, it is not being copied to its Variant. 

In OMSR the field "Propose field cont." is checked. 
Also, the LTEXT_GRUN is maintained under "Copy Control for Material Master fields". 

Can you please put some light, to make this situation favourable.

entry.title: Re: Calculating Bradford Factor and sending Alerts using SAP SuccessFactors
entry.content:
Hi

We are currently testing the Bradford factor functionality in the system and have encountered an issue with an employee who has one inactive record and one active record. The custom Bradford factor score is not being calculated for this employee. Do you happen to know why the system is not calculating the score for users with inactive and active accounts?

entry.title: Re: Link another production Order while creating production Order in DI API

entry.title: How can we map unplanned delivery cost like freight handling charge from Ariba to SAP.
entry.content:
How can unplanned delivery cost like freight , handling charge added at the time of submitting invoice in Ariba , be mapped to particular GL account in SAP , while posting through MIRO. 

Ex- PO created with amount 1000 inr in Ariba
while submitting inv additional amount of handling charge 20 INR is added. 
Now how system determines to which GL this handling charge will post to , once Invoice is interfaced from Ariba to SAP.

entry.content: Were you able to get a fix for this issue?

entry.title: documentation to configure windows AD Single Sign on for SAP Data Services

Is it enough the configure IPS or is it something to be done on Data Services installation side ?

Available to discuss.

Best regards,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: documentation to configure windows AD Single Sign on...
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

Please refer this  KBA ##2543369 - How to setup Windows AD SSO for Data Services to configure SSO for designer and Data Services Management Console.

Thanks,

SAP Support

entry.title: Failed to load destination. Caused by: No user token (JWT) has been provided. This is strictly neces
entry.content:
Hi, I am trying to call sap odata service from a cap application uisnng cds spawn job.Using  destination with PrincipalPropagation, But geeting below error: -

logs:-
[cds] - connect to sap_odata > odata-v2 { destination: 'sap_destination', forwardAuthToken: true }
2024-05-29T21:07:57.42+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/1] ERR [remote] - Error: Error during request to remote service:
2024-05-29T21:07:57.42+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/1] ERR Failed to load destination.
2024-05-29T21:07:57.42+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/1] ERR at run (/home/vcap/app/node_modules/@sap/cds/libx/_runtime/remote/utils/client.js:310:31)
2024-05-29T21:07:57.42+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/1] ERR at process.processTicksAndRejections (node:internal/process/task_queues:95:5)
2024-05-29T21:07:57.42+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/1] ERR at async RemoteService.<anonymous> (/home/vcap/app/node_modules/@sap/cds/libx/_runtime/remote/Service.js:276:20)
2024-05-29T21:07:57.42+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/1] ERR at async next (/home/vcap/app/node_modules/@sap/cds/lib/srv/srv-dispatch.js:76:17)
2024-05-29T21:07:57.42+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/1] ERR at async RemoteService.handle (/home/vcap/app/node_modules/@sap/cds/lib/srv/srv-dispatch.js:74:10)
2024-05-29T21:07:57.42+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/1] ERR at async Object.methodName(/home/vcap/app/srv/util/myfile.js:102:24)
2024-05-29T21:07:57.42+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/1] ERR at async mycatfile (/home/vcap/app/srv/util/mycatfile.js:524:22) {
2024-05-29T21:07:57.42+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/1] ERR statusCode: 502,
2024-05-29T21:07:57.42+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/1] ERR reason: {
2024-05-29T21:07:57.42+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/1] ERR message: 'Error during request to remote service: \n' +
2024-05-29T21:07:57.42+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/1] ERR "Failed to load destination. Caused by: No user token (JWT) has been provided. This is strictly necessary for 'PrincipalPropagation'.",
2024-05-29T21:07:57.42+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/1] ERR request: {
2024-05-29T21:07:57.42+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/1] ERR method: 'POST',
2024-05-29T21:07:57.42+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/1] ERR url: '/xxxx/xxxxxx_SRV/dummyEntitySet',
2024-05-29T21:07:57.42+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/1] ERR headers: {
2024-05-29T21:07:57.42+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/1] ERR accept: 'application/json,text/plain',
2024-05-29T21:07:57.42+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/1] ERR 'accept-language': 'en',
2024-05-29T21:07:57.42+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/1] ERR 'content-type': 'application/json',
2024-05-29T21:07:57.42+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/1] ERR 'content-length': 311,
2024-05-29T21:07:57.42+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/1] ERR authorization: 'Bearer ...'
2024-05-29T21:07:57.42+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/1] ERR }
2024-05-29T21:07:57.42+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/1] ERR },
2024-05-29T21:07:57.42+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/1] ERR correlationId: '507a3d4f-bf6d-4296-4cc1-f6b8f070ee2b'
2024-05-29T21:07:57.42+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/1] ERR }
2024-05-29T21:07:57.42+0530 [APP/PROC/WEB/1] ERR } 

my code :- 

 

cds.spawn({ 
          user: cds.context?.user,
          tenant: cds.context?.tenant,
          headers: cds.context?.headers || req?.headers,
          after: iafterTime }, async (req) => {
         sendToSAP(req, customID)
})

const sendToSAP = async (req, customID) => {   
    const payload = {}  
    const oSAPService = await cds.connect.to("sap_destination")
    let headers = { "Content-Type": "application/json" }
    headers.authorization = cds.context?.headers || req?.headers
      const response = await oSAPService.send({
        method: "POST",
        path: "/xxxx/xxxxxx_SRV/dummyEntitySet",
        data: payload,
        headers: headers
      });
}

 


dependencies :- 

"node": "^18.0.0"
"@sap/cds": "6.8.4"

entry.title: Re: Crystal Reports: "maximum report processing job limit"
entry.content:
Hello,

What SP are you using, currently SP 35 is the latest, if you don't have it download it from here:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/crystalreports/3354091173.html

See my blog on upgrading:

Upgrading a Visual Studio 2008->2022 .NET project with the latest CR .NET SDK packages

Try clearing your cache, Browsers can keep alive the printjob.

CR for VS has always limited users to 3 active printjobs, so something your app is keeping them alive, you need to add debugging or logging steps to see what it's doing.

What OS and version of IIS are you using?

Didn't describe the steps your app is using or any work flow when this happens so it's hard to say what you need to change.

Did it work before, if so what has changed in your environment?

If using another Reporting tool is your only option then good luck on the change.

entry.title: Re: ​Schedule of Analysis for Office workbook in SAC is s...
entry.content:
Hi there,


My name is Alan Golding and I work for an SAP Partner company who developers software for SAP customers. 
We just released a Publishing software that allows you to schedule AO workbooks that are stored in SAC. 

If this topic is still of interest let me know.

Thanks

Alan

entry.title: Re: Are there plans to update the Spring framework within...
entry.content: I would suggest downloading it and checking if the fix is in. CVE's are security issues so info on any CVE's is not available to the public, you require a Support contract to access the gated KBA's. FYI, Crystal Reports itself doesn't use Java, it does use Java Script to handle Parameters, actually it uses HTML5 for prompting. CR Server/BOE does use it but it's also a SAP version of Java and not Oracles.

entry.title: Re: Are there plans to update the Spring framework within...
entry.content:
FYI - Resources for more info:

https://pages.community.sap.com/topics/crystal-reports/faq

CR default home page:

https://support.sap.com/en/product/support-by-product/01200314690800000341.html

All CR/BOE product Help documents, note depending on if you ahve a Support Contract depends on more info available.
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_CRYSTAL_REPORTS

entry.title: Re: SAP Cyrstal Reports 2020 64 bit and Oracle 19c Databa...
entry.content:
See CR's Data Access excel file for supported Oracle Clients:

https://assets.cdn.sap.com/sapcom/docs/2020/06/b2ec5eaa-9d7d-0010-87a3-c30de2ffd8ff.pdf

Try using ODBC or OLE DB connection and see if that works better

entry.title: Re: How to achieve dynamic selection screen in frontend u...
entry.content:
Unfortunately, we can only be creative with how we use the framework.

I think in your case, instead of having 2 radio buttons, you can have 2 types of views in the list page.

Each view will have its own selection screen fields and result table columns.

You can refer to this link:

https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/sdk/#/topic/37aeed74e17a42caa2cba3123f0c15fc

Basically, the first tab represents radio button A and second tab represents radio button B. You can try to play around and feel free to ask if you encountered any challenges.

entry.title: Re: Crystal Report Password
entry.content: If you look closer at the log on prompt it's asking you to log into BOE System and not your DB, likely the report uses something in the repository, Universe or formula etc.

entry.title: Table and Field for Customer Invoice Status VF03
entry.content:
Hi All,

We are working on a report and we need the invoice status whether it's completed or canceled or credit memo created. I am using VBRK-RFBSK. Is it the correct field? is there any other field or FM for fetching invoice status?

Also when I am checking VBRK-RFBSK at table level it is showing A or B or C so on.

 

how can we fetch this text as well??

Thanks,
Aravind

entry.title: BAPI action group connection error
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am trying to follow the below tutorial as-is to see how a BAPI action group would work for an on-premise S/4 system. However, I get a connection failed error without any further details.

https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/spa-bapi-actiongroup.html

Not sure, if we have to explicitly add the BAPI SDK under dependencies. But, I have added it as well.

Our on-prem system properties looks like this:

I sign in using an Id and password and we also have a VPN that we need to be connected to (Not sure if that matters).

Can I have any experts advice what type of connection should I choose in the BAPI action group? I have tried all combinations of connection type even though some of them are not relevant. I get 'connection error' for all of them.

I also have the desktop agent installed and is in attended mode.

Is there any other setting that needs to be taken care of, eg: in the backend system? Has anyone experienced this issue before?

Tagging expert: @Dan_Wroblewski

entry.title: Re: Preview function in the service binding does not work and starts Notepad

entry.content:
Hello @julieplummer20 , sorry to ask again, or perhaps you missed my earlier question. As @ralf_henning indicated over here, we should be able to get a reasonably recent SAP GUI shortly after 2022 is released. Is this still planned? 

Unfortunately I have several issues with the dated version that's currently available for download, most notably that it doesn't play nicely with Eclipse on a Mac. Anything html, including many popup messages, won't display the content so I'm really hoping a version 8 GUI will fix this kind of issue:

entry.title: Re: Include in job log the values of datastore configurat...
entry.content: Good to know that substitution parameters *can* be referenced in scripts.

entry.title: Re: Stop creation of maintenance work order
entry.content:
Hi Arif

If the Functional Location is Inactive, then all the equipment under this Fl is inactive. 

You need to inactive the FL & EQ, also the maintenance plan

Regards

Terence

entry.title: Re: Change System Status in PM order dependend to order Type
entry.content:
Hi,

What is the issue you are facing with one order type ? Share the screenshot of the error and give your explanation clearly.

Regards

Terence

entry.title: Re: Include in job log the values of datastore configurat...
entry.content:
Good to know that substitution parameters *can* be referenced in scripts. But when I run a simple batch job that contains nothing more than a script that references a substitution parameter...

print('[$$UserDir]');

...where $$UserDir is set to "\\Server1\UserDir\" for the job's selected system configuration, the value of the substitution parameter is not displayed, and the following error occurs:

Syntax error at line <50> : <SET ("job_GV_$Condition1" = '\'N'', "job_GV_$G_ContainerCost" = '0.10000', ...

I've tried using variations of the substitution parameter (e.g., [$UserDir], [UserDir], $[UserDir], $$[UserDir], $[$$UserDir]). All such variations tend to simply generate a syntax error that lists the values of many (all?) the job's variables.

What am I missing?

Update: Looks like the problem is the use of backslashes. When I change $$UserDir from "\\Server1\UserDir\" to "//Server1/UserDir/" no error occurs and the value of the substitution parameter is displayed.

entry.title: SAP CPI - Event Mesh - Message monitoring and multiple runs for iFlow
entry.content:
Hello Community!

So, I have this iFlow that consumes a message from the Event Mesh and does X. This is good most of the times, but sometimes I will see this in the log:

The process is configured to redeliver a message 1 time on the Event Mesh side, and to try reprocessing a message 1 time on the iFlow, and so when I tested this, I could see 2 runs for a failed message. 

However here I see multiple runs (3 or 4 depending on the day), and I can see all runs in status completed.  Furthermore, unlike my testing, all these runs have processed a different message from Event Mesh, so it looks like all these runs are all bundled for some reason, and I have no idea why. I have also confirmed that all runs were successful, since I see the result in the destination system.

I thought this "runs" section was showing all the runs for a given message that failed on a previous run, but this is not the case.

I know I am missing something; I just don't know what.

I am happy to provide any more details that might be needed. Any tip will be helpful!

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: SAP Data Analyst Certification
entry.content: Thanks for sharing Megan! Great way to stay relevant in today's competitive job market.

entry.title: What happens when a Data Flow fails?
entry.content:
You are using DSP as a Data Fabric to load multiple data sources, and all works great, and you can enjoy life (you know, teleworking from some heavenly place) ... until something goes wrong. You receive an email that a Data Flow has failed. That SFTP seems to be not as reliable as it should be, so now what?

Leave your Virgin Mojito and open DSP.

 

 

 

 

Test definition

The test consists of loading a CSV with 30,000 rows by means of a Data Flow, and to provoke an error in the middle of the process, to see what we obtain in the destination table.

The CSV has 30000 rows, with two fields:

  • ID: consecutive numeric
  • VAL: string with the value '1' in all rows except 20101 which has a 'AAA'.

The source is SFTP, configuring the CSV as:

  • ID as Int32
  • VAL as String(1).
  • Control Fetch Size active to 1000 rows.
  • Fail Run on String Truncate = On. This will cause row 20101 to give an error for exceeding the defined size of string(1).

The destination is a DSP local table with

  • ID: int32
  • VAL: String (1)
  • Control Fetch Size active to 1000 rows.

 

Test Results

The execution of the data flow ends with error.

In the destination table, data has been saved, specifically the IDs ranging from 1 to 19000.
So I draw two conclusions:
- The most important is that the DF execution is not an “all or nothing” type, and commits have been made during the process.
- The second conclusion is that as we have two fetch controls, in source and in destination, it seems that this makes that the block of rows 19,001-20,000 has not been loaded even if it did not have any error, surely, when the block of 1,000 rows with error was read the exception was thrown, and the part that saves in the destination had not yet processed the block of 19,001-20,000, and that is why we do not have it.

I did a second test by increasing the rows to 110,000, leaving the wrong row at 105,001, and removing the fetch size control on both sides, to check if the theoretical maximum limit of the fetch size is 100,000.
But it saved from row 1 to 104,000 ... implying that the fetch size was not 100,000. I don't know if the value it takes depends on the source, the combination of them, etc.

 

Which implies

When doing ETLs with delta loads that are manually managed based on e.g. timestamps, there is a risk that when an error occurs, rows from a failed load are left in the target table.
This may cause the calculation of the next timestamp to be loaded to be erroneous, so these rows should be deleted before their calculation.

entry.title: Knowledge Graphs - Datasphere vs HANA Cloud
entry.content:
There are some key differences between the graph capabilities in SAP HANA Cloud and the new announcement SAP Datasphere knowledge graph:

1. SAP HANA Cloud has had a powerful graph engine for analyzing complex relationships in business data for a while now. It allows creating graph workspaces from existing tables/views, querying graphs using openCypher, writing custom graph algorithms, and visualizing graphs.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-hana-graph-resources/ba-p/13505490

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=oaSQu9laYKE

 

2. Datasphere Creating knowledge graphs manually is very costly, so SAP Datasphere comes to help by automatically pre-populating them using content already available in SAP Datasphere like connections to source systems, tables, foreign keys etc. SAP Datasphere knowledge graph is a new capability announced in March 2024. As data is onboarded and integrated into SAP Datasphere, it automatically creates an ontology representing the relationships in the data, including business context from SAP sources like S/4HANA

caption by SAP. Currently in Preview

 https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=PQrFjthwOWQ&t=169

https://news.sap.com/2024/03/future-of-data-driven-business-new-sap-datasphere-capabilities/

Conclusion

While the SAP HANA Cloud graph is more for custom graph algorithm development and analysis, the SAP Datasphere knowledge graph is an automated capability that provides a rich context for generative AI use cases by capturing complex data relationships and metadata. The two serve different but complementary purposes in the SAP data and analytics portfolio.

Additional information:
https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/how-use-sap-hana-cloud-graph-model-analyze-complex-your-holitschke

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-hana-graph-resources/ba-p/13505490

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/native-hana-vs-sap-datasphere-findings/qaq-p/12689997

https://www.techzine.eu/blogs/data-management/117331/sap-expands-datasphere-with-knowledge-graph-and-compass/

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/sap-datasphere-is-an-alternative-of-sap-hana-modelling-with-more-features/qaq-p/12701049

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/access-sap-hana-cloud-underneath-of-sap-datasphere/ba-p/13569825

https://developers.sap.com/group.hana-aa-graph-overview.html

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content: Hello from UAE. I just got a job which is related to SAP. Hopefully I can improve my skills here.

entry.title: Re: Welcome
entry.content: Hello I'm new to this community also. Good to see someone new, hopefully this community will help us.

entry.title: Re: ISAGENT_MIN_J5 component is not installed
entry.content: Hello Vera, many thanks for your reply! You give a really good guidance! First things first, you are right! My colleague only imported the cimsap files, so I thought we have an up to date CR content, but we didn't! I fixed that, I launched the report RLAPI_MANUAL_SINGLE_SYNC against the Solman Java system. Unfortunately it didn't help! I also checked SAP note 3297242, but the system says that the note can't be implemented. So I am further stuck on this and this point is still red 😞 Do you have any further ideas please ? Many thanks!

entry.title: HANA Wrong File
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We installed a new HANA DB and an S4HANA Server. Everything worked perfectly. However, we've now found that the HANA filesystems were completely reorganized or moved. No one has moved or changed these data. Thus, the HANA DB doesn't start. The files are now located on the OS as follows: /hana/shared/SID/global/hdb/data/mnt00001 (the mnt00001 file is located here). On another server, where the HANA DB starts without any issues, there is no mnt00001 file in this directory. Additionally, the SID directory under /hana/data/ has been found missing. Similarly, the SID directory under /hana/log/ has also been found missing.
We created an SID directory under /hana/log/ and /hana/data/. Then, we moved the mnt00001 file from /hana/shared/SID/global/hdb/data/mnt00001 to /hana/log/SID and /hana/data/SID. After that, we created a link from /hana/shared/SID/global/hdb/data to /hana/data/SID and from /hana/shared/SID/global/hdb/log to /hana/log/SID. And we were able to start the database.

How can we resolve this without a symbolic link?

 

Many Thanks

Best Regards

Tuncay

entry.title: Need information
entry.content:
Hi SAP Family,

I am beginner in SAP field, looking for guidance

Thank you so much in advance 

 

Regards 

Rashmi

entry.title: SAP Data Archiving
entry.content:
Hello Experts!

I have such an issue that I am working on, and I wonder if you have had a similar situation.
Let's say the company archives files and we have several application servers.
On one particular server, there is a dedicated disk where the file is archived.
The address is written in the transaction FILE, where you specify the logical path.
The situation is as follows: on the first application where the disk is allocated, Files are archived if only that application is enabled and others are disabled.
If other applications are enabled, the file is not physically archived, and it says that a specific archived file cannot be opened.
Have you ever had a similar situation, and if so, how did you solve a similar problem?

Regards

 Rashmi

entry.title: Re: Write permissions to SAP Datasphere via OAuth and RES...
entry.content:
Hi Håkan,

I see you've also posted a related question too here Is writing to SAP Datasphere using OData4 / REST supported?

I could add more comments. SAP Datasphere has OData API for both Catalog and Consumption but all APIs are GET --only for reading from external app--

If you meant pushing data from external with REST / OData API to Datasphere it's not available. But you can pull data via OData connection in Datasphere with OAuth authentication, see Generic OData Connections

Regards,
Tuncay

entry.title: Re: May Developer Challenge - AI Services - Week 5
entry.content:
My submission for week 5 !

Thanks for all the challenges. For Data Attribute Recommendation, I think I'll need more time to understand the concept and what each API request is doing. I appreciate this opportunity to know this service.

entry.title: SAP Code Jam in Wroclaw
entry.content:
Hello Thomas,

We would like to host a SAP CodeJam in Wroclaw, Poland on 5 July 2024. On 6 July 2024 will be organized SAP Inside Track in Wroclaw.

Location: Wroclaw
Topic: "SAP Fiori elements flexible programming model"
Time: 5.07.2024
Capacity: ~25 persons

Best regards,

Anna Wilk

entry.title: Data binding issue in sap UI5
entry.content:
Hello,
I am new to Fiori front-end development and I was given a request to change the description of an already existing field. It seemed pretty easy. I have made the text dynamic by using TVARVC values. But after changing the field heading, the value entered in that field is not getting captured. 
Initially the Field name used to be "Pieces" and based on the plant it should display as "Pieces/Layers". The data entered in the field is getting captured if it is either "Pieces" or "Layers" but when I display it as "Pieces/Layers" i am getting the issue. 
I thought it maybe due to the length of the text and tried different combinations but nothing worked. 
Can someone please let me know why these kind of errors may occur and where can I look in the code or which file maybe helpful to resolve this issue? 

all the other fields are working as expected.


Thank you.

entry.title: Re: OffBoarding workbook
entry.content:
Hi Michele,

 

Please use the Below link to get the English version of the Offboarding workbboks.

https://help.sap.com/docs/link-disclaimer?site=https%3A%2F%2Ffile.sapbestpractices.net%2Fb2405%2Fdocumentation%2FHelpPortal%2FWorkbook%2FSAPBP_SAPSuccessFactorsOffboarding_UpgradeCenter.zip.

Regards,

Omkar S.

entry.title: License
entry.content:
Hi, I have a message on th lower left corner of SAP staying that I'm using a test license with a validity till the end of the year, is this correct?

We hired a valid license from a certified SAP partner in Chile.

 

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Re: May Developer Challenge - AI Services - Week 5
entry.content: Here's my Submission. Thank you Nora for this challenge around the AI Service

entry.title: Re: SAP Cyrstal Reports 2020 64 bit and Oracle 19c Databa...
entry.content:
That is the Oracle.NET driver, not the standard Oracle client. You need to have the full version of the Oracle Client installed with a tnsnames.ora file configured in order to fully use the native Oracle connection type in Crystal.

The Oracle.NET driver requires loading the full .NET framework and then working through that.  The regular Oracle Client doesn't have the overhead of loading .NET and is much faster.

-Dell
